stemHtml: Views on human reliability are changing over time. Which of the following statements should go next?

options.a: It is thought that it will be possible to eliminate errors in the near future.
options.b: Human errors are now considered as being inevitable.
options.c: The individual view of safety has gradually replaced the systemic view of safety.
options.d: Human errors can be avoided. All it takes is to be vigilant and to extend one’s knowledge.
